agents.name: Claude Code
agents.note: Full gateway control: the dashboard can start/stop/restart/status/run this agent headlessly.

agents.name: Service Agent (24/7 example)
agents.note: owner: native-service = runs as a Windows Scheduled Task 24/7. The dashboard manages the service and asks for confirmation before destructive actions. probe = real TCP liveness check. watchdog: true = auto-restart when down (max 3x/hour).

agents.name: CLI-only Agent (observability example)
agents.note: No gateway subcommand — actions: [] means observability-only. The dashboard shows status from telemetry and offers a Summon button (opens an admin terminal at `home` and runs `trigger`). If the CLI is missing, Summon shows `install` guidance (cmd + url) instead of opening a dead terminal. `accent` (optional #hex) colors this agent everywhere in the UI; agents added via the dashboard's ＋ ADD AGENT button get it automatically.
